hooks_by_platform.source: Derived from hook-taxonomy.json + platform algorithm YAMLs
hooks_by_platform.description: Hook types organized by platform, ranked by effectiveness, with platform-specific adaptation notes

instagram.algorithm_context: Prioritizes saves, shares, watch-through rate (Reels), and time-on-content (carousels/stories). Early engagement velocity matters most.

top_hooks.why_works: Pattern interrupt in the scroll stops the thumb. Instagram Reels algorithm heavily weights first 1-3 seconds retention.
top_hooks.adaptation: First frame must be visually arresting — movement, unusual angle, text overlay with incomplete thought, or face with strong emotion

top_hooks.why_works: Starts in action, bypasses the 'should I watch?' decision. Creates immediate narrative investment.
top_hooks.adaptation: Open mid-sentence or mid-action. Never use intros, logos, or 'hey guys' openings

top_hooks.why_works: Creates 'wait what?' reaction that extends watch time past the critical 3-second mark.
top_hooks.adaptation: Pair with text overlay that reinforces the claim. Deliver proof within 15 seconds

top_hooks.why_works: Drives watch-through to completion (algorithm signal). Creates saves for 'watch later'.
top_hooks.adaptation: Text overlay with '...' or cut-off sentence. Payoff must come at end to maximize retention

top_hooks.why_works: Before/after hooks drive saves and shares. Instagram algorithm loves save-worthy content.
top_hooks.adaptation: Show the 'before' state first — the transformation creates natural watch-through

top_hooks.why_works: Drives swipe-through (key algorithm signal). Each slide can deepen the gap before closing it.
top_hooks.adaptation: Slide 1: Hook with incomplete thought. Slide 2-9: Progressive reveal. Slide 10: Payoff + CTA

top_hooks.why_works: Carousels are the highest-save format on Instagram. How-to content drives saves (bookmark for later).
top_hooks.adaptation: Slide 1: Clear outcome promise. Subsequent slides: One step per slide

top_hooks.why_works: '{Number} ways to...' creates expectation of completeness that drives full swipe-through.
top_hooks.adaptation: One item per slide. Include 'swipe for #X' on each slide

top_hooks.why_works: Drives comments and shares (debate). Controversy = engagement velocity.
top_hooks.adaptation: Slide 1: Contrarian statement. Slides 2-5: Evidence. Slides 6-9: Implications. Slide 10: CTA

top_hooks.why_works: Creates 'me too' recognition that drives saves and shares with caption 'this is so true'.
top_hooks.adaptation: Slide 1: Describe the pain. Remaining slides: Solution steps

top_hooks.why_works: Stories are ephemeral — FOMO is native to the format. 24-hour window creates natural urgency.
top_hooks.adaptation: Quick, casual, behind-the-scenes. Poll stickers and question stickers amplify engagement

top_hooks.why_works: Stories poll/question stickers create interactive engagement signals the algorithm loves.
top_hooks.adaptation: Use native interactive elements (polls, sliders, questions) to boost engagement rate

top_hooks.why_works: Stories with value hooks drive profile visits and link clicks — direct conversion pathway.
top_hooks.adaptation: 'Swipe up' or 'Link in bio' CTA pairs naturally with value hooks

platform_principles: Visual-first: The image/video must hook before any text
Save signal: Content people bookmark performs best algorithmically
Share signal: Content people send via DM gets highest distribution
Engagement velocity: First 30-60 minutes of engagement determine reach
Consistency > virality: Regular posting builds distribution advantage

tiktok.algorithm_context: Watch-through rate is the #1 signal. Loop rate (replays) is #2. Shares to DM/text drive distribution. Comments boost but less than watch metrics.

top_hooks.why_works: Platform-native hooks blend with user's feed expectations. Trend-aware content gets algorithmic boost.
top_hooks.adaptation: Use trending sounds, POV format, fast cuts, casual energy. Never look/feel like a commercial

top_hooks.why_works: TikTok's For You Page rewards pattern interrupts. Bold claims create immediate stop-scroll.
top_hooks.adaptation: Deliver claim in first second. Speak directly to camera. High energy. Prove claim within 15 seconds

top_hooks.why_works: The scroll is fastest on TikTok. Visual interrupts are the only reliable scroll-stopper.
top_hooks.adaptation: First frame must be maximally different from typical content. Movement, unusual framing, text+visual combo

top_hooks.why_works: TikTok's trend culture makes FOMO hooks extremely effective. Users fear being out of the loop.
top_hooks.adaptation: Reference trends, current events, or 'everyone's doing this' social proof

top_hooks.why_works: Authenticity is TikTok's currency. Confessions feel raw and real — they outperform polished content.
top_hooks.adaptation: Casual setting, no editing, direct to camera. The rawer it looks, the better it performs

top_hooks.why_works: Creates comment section debates that boost engagement metrics. Stitch/duet amplification.
top_hooks.adaptation: Call out a common behavior, not a person. Enable stitches/duets for response content

platform_principles: Authenticity > production value: Raw outperforms polished
Sound-on default: Audio hooks matter as much as visual
Loop architecture: Videos that seamlessly loop get replayed (algorithm gold)
Comment bait: Controversial or incomplete content drives comments
Trend-riding: Using trending sounds/formats gets algorithmic distribution boost

youtube.algorithm_context: Click-through rate (thumbnail + title) is the #1 factor. Then average view duration. Then session time (does your video lead to more YouTube watching?).

top_hooks.why_works: Thumbnail + title synergy is the primary hook on YouTube. The video hook is secondary to CTR.
top_hooks.adaptation: Thumbnail: emotion face + curiosity element. Title: Open loop + keyword. First 30s: Payoff promise

top_hooks.why_works: YouTube rewards average view duration. Curiosity gaps that take 10+ minutes to close maximize this metric.
top_hooks.adaptation: Title creates the gap. Intro promises the payoff. Content delivers incrementally. Best hooks delay the biggest reveal

top_hooks.why_works: YouTube viewers actively search for solutions. Results proof in title/thumbnail drives CTR from search.
top_hooks.adaptation: Specific numbers in title. Before/after in thumbnail. First 30s: Social proof + roadmap of video

top_hooks.why_works: YouTube's long-form format allows extended secret reveals that maximize watch time.
top_hooks.adaptation: 'What they don't tell you about...' format. Chapters that progressively reveal deeper secrets

top_hooks.why_works: List-format videos (7 mistakes, 5 strategies) create clear structure that retains viewers through each item.
top_hooks.adaptation: Countdown format (start from least impactful, build to #1). Viewers stay to see what's #1

top_hooks.why_works: YouTube Shorts compete with TikTok/Reels. Same scroll-stop dynamics apply.
top_hooks.adaptation: Identical to TikTok approach. Fast, bold, visual, under 60 seconds

top_hooks.why_works: Shorts funnel viewers to long-form content. How-to hooks create demand for the deeper video.
top_hooks.adaptation: Quick tip format with 'full video on my channel' CTA

platform_principles: CTR is king: Thumbnail and title do 80% of the hook work
First 30 seconds: Must hook, establish credibility, and promise value
Retention curves: YouTube tracks second-by-second retention — every dip loses viewers permanently
Session time: Videos that lead to more watching get recommended more
Search + Browse: Optimize for both intent-based (search) and discovery (suggested)

linkedin.algorithm_context: Dwell time (time spent reading) is the #1 signal. Comments boost distribution more than likes. Shares to feed create cascading reach. First hour engagement is critical.

top_hooks.why_works: LinkedIn's culture rewards professional vulnerability and hard-won insight. Native hooks match this energy.
top_hooks.adaptation: First line: Personal story or contrarian insight. Second line: Stakes or tension. Then 'see more' break

top_hooks.why_works: LinkedIn's comment culture rewards debate. Contrarian posts generate the longest comment threads.
top_hooks.adaptation: Challenge industry convention. Be specific ('Stop using {specific tool/practice}'). Provide alternative

top_hooks.why_works: LinkedIn is the one platform where credentials enhance rather than hinder hook performance.
top_hooks.adaptation: 'After 15 years in {industry}...' format works. Lead with years/results, then insight

top_hooks.why_works: Career transformation stories are LinkedIn's highest-performing content type. Professional vulnerability drives engagement.
top_hooks.adaptation: Career failure → lesson learned format. 'I was fired/failed/rejected' hooks outperform success stories

top_hooks.why_works: Questions drive comments, which is LinkedIn's highest-weighted engagement signal.
top_hooks.adaptation: End with a genuine question that invites professional perspective. Avoid yes/no questions

top_hooks.why_works: LinkedIn carousels (document format) drive saves and shares. How-to frameworks are the #1 saved content type.
top_hooks.adaptation: Slide 1: Clear framework name + benefit. 8-12 slides total. One concept per slide

top_hooks.why_works: '{Number} lessons from...' format drives swipe-through and saves on LinkedIn.
top_hooks.adaptation: Professional framing. Include your credential on slide 1. Framework-style presentation

platform_principles: Text-first platform: Written hooks outperform visual hooks
Professional vulnerability: Career struggles + lessons > humble brags
Comment quality: Thoughtful comments boost distribution more than emoji reactions
Dwell time: Long posts that hold attention outperform short posts
First 2 lines: Everything before 'see more' determines whether the post gets read

x_twitter.algorithm_context: Replies and quote tweets are the #1 engagement signals. Bookmark rate is emerging. Thread retention (reading full thread) matters. Algorithmic timeline favors accounts with consistent engagement.

single_tweets.optimal_hook_window: First line (280 char limit forces compression)

top_hooks.why_works: X/Twitter's culture is built on hot takes. Contrarian hooks drive quote tweets (highest distribution signal).
top_hooks.adaptation: One sentence, maximum compression. Bold claim. No hedging. Thread with evidence if needed

top_hooks.why_works: X thrives on tribal dynamics. Us-vs-them hooks create instant engagement from both sides.
top_hooks.adaptation: Simple binary framing. Let both sides argue in replies. Engagement from both sides boosts distribution

top_hooks.why_works: Questions drive replies, which is X's primary engagement signal. Provoke thought, get answers.
top_hooks.adaptation: Short, punchy question. Avoid multi-part questions. One provocative line

top_hooks.why_works: Compressed format amplifies bold claims. The constraint of 280 characters creates natural punch.
top_hooks.adaptation: Maximum compression. Every word must earn its place. No filler

hooks_to_avoid: How-To Promise (too long for single tweet)

top_hooks.why_works: '{Number} things I learned from...' threads are the highest-saved content type on X. Creates read-through expectation.
top_hooks.adaptation: Tweet 1: Hook with number + promise. Each subsequent tweet: One point. Final tweet: Summary + CTA

top_hooks.why_works: Thread format naturally creates open loops. Each tweet is a mini-hook for the next.
top_hooks.adaptation: End each tweet with a hook into the next. Last tweet: Deliver the payoff + 'RT the first tweet'

top_hooks.why_works: Insider knowledge threads drive massive bookmarks and quote tweets on X.
top_hooks.adaptation: 'Behind the scenes of how {company/person} did {impressive thing}' format

platform_principles: Compression is power: Fewer words = more impact on X
Quote tweets > likes: Content that gets quote tweeted reaches new networks
Thread retention: Each tweet must hook independently while building the thread
Hot take culture: Bold opinions outperform balanced analysis
Bookmark signal: Emerging algorithm signal — value content that gets saved

universal_hooks.description: Hook types that work on ALL platforms with minor adaptation
universal_hooks.note: These 5 hooks are the minimum viable hook library for any brand

platform_exclusive_hooks.note: These hooks should NEVER be used on other platforms — they'll feel inauthentic

repurpose_adaptation_guide.reel_to_tiktok: Direct repurpose works. Adjust sound to trending TikTok audio. Remove Instagram-specific CTAs
repurpose_adaptation_guide.thread_to_carousel: Each tweet becomes a slide. Add visual design. Expand compressed points
repurpose_adaptation_guide.linkedin_to_thread: Decompress. Break long paragraphs into single-point tweets. Add more direct hook per tweet
repurpose_adaptation_guide.youtube_to_shorts: Extract the single most compelling 60 seconds. Lead with the hook, not the buildup
